en: Remember that name you all had for me when I was at Internal Affairs?
ko: 내가 내무부에 있을 때 너희가 나를 부르던 이름 기억나?

en: Why should I hide who I am?
ko: 너가 나를 경고하려 했다는 걸 알아.

en: I know you're trying to warn me, I'm sorry.
Wurtz picked you up, was he looking for them?
Do you know who picked up Rachel?
ko: 하비, 내 남자 중 누구를 믿을 수 있는지 알아야 해.

en: Harvey, I need to know which of my men I can trust.
Why would you listen to me now?
